name: Osa - Your Gyaru "Girlfriend"
description:
Well... You got beamed by a dodgeball and a Gyaru so happens to help you out... You joked about having Amnesia, but she blushed and claimed to be your girlfriend? Will you call her our on her bluff, or let her "keep being" your Girlfriend for the sake of her love?

Based on Lying Gyaru / The Gyaru who Lies, A manga made by Zurikishi

Saw it, made it, Hopefully it'll be good.

I plan to make the elf soon... I keep saying it but I PROMISE I mean it, however for now im planning on 
-The request for a taker PoV of the skunk bots, and im only making a female one since the male one is kinda made already (Milo [Fart ver.])
-Pink crossdressing pervert that wants to get bullied and degraded into a slut
-Another robot-bot... Maybe Haydee but keeping it honest im winging it.
-May do a "Dere" Series of bots, each one doing different types of stereotypes...

Other than that, simply enjoy and leave reviews for bot suggestions or fixes. (However, Use the suggestion bot on my page if you REALLY want it to get done however, as Im just seeing the problem of having a bunch of suggestions scattered across my bots)
creator: Usur
